message:
fix(codegen): Fix param discard __shadow suffix and VM fallback var tracking

- emitParamDiscard now checks for shadows_class_method, shadows_module_level,
  and shadows_local_scope to match signature.zig's __shadow suffix logic
- Add collectVMFallbackVars to track variables used in VM fallback expressions
  so they get proper discards
- Fix ast field names (list.elts, tuple.elts instead of .elements)
